all.en: My sister and I had planned a long horror movie marathon for Friday night.
all.zh: 我和姊姊本來計畫週五晚上來一場長長的恐怖片馬拉松。

all.en: We made popcorn, ordered pizza, and dimmed all the lights in the living room.
all.zh: 我們爆了爆米花、叫了披薩，並把客廳的燈光調暗。

all.en: About twenty minutes into the first movie, the entire neighborhood went dark.
all.zh: 第一部電影大概放了二十分鐘，整個社區就一片漆黑。

all.en: At first, we thought a fuse had blown inside our apartment.
all.zh: 起初，我們以為是公寓裡的保險絲燒掉了。

all.en: However, looking out the window, every nearby building was also pitch black.
all.zh: 但是從窗戶望出去，附近每一棟大樓也都漆黑一片。

all.en: My sister joked that the movie had become unexpectedly interactive.
all.zh: 姊姊開玩笑說，這部電影意外地變得很有互動感。

all.en: We lit several candles and grabbed two flashlights from the kitchen drawer.
all.zh: 我們點了幾根蠟燭，從廚房抽屜拿出兩支手電筒。

all.en: Instead of the movie, we ended up telling each other old ghost stories.
all.zh: 我們最後沒看電影，反而互相講起小時候的鬼故事。

all.en: It was actually scarier than anything we had planned to watch.
all.zh: 這比我們原本要看的東西都還要恐怖。

all.en: The power finally came back around midnight, but we were too tired to continue.
all.zh: 電力終於在午夜時恢復，但我們已經太累了沒辦法繼續。

all.en: Honestly, the blackout turned out to be the best part of the evening.
all.zh: 老實說，這場停電反而成了當晚最棒的一段時光。

all.en: The next morning, my sister woke up still wrapped in her warm blanket.
all.zh: 隔天早上，姊姊醒來時仍裹在她那條暖暖的毛毯裡。

all.en: She declared that every Friday should now include at least one candlelit hour.
all.zh: 她宣布從今以後每個週五都應該至少要有一小時的燭光時光。

all.en: I checked the news and learned a substation had failed during a heavy storm.
all.zh: 我查看新聞，得知一場強烈暴風雨導致變電所故障。

all.en: Our neighbors gathered outside, chatting about who had the longest blackout.
all.zh: 鄰居們聚集在外面，閒聊誰家停電時間最久。

all.en: An elderly woman across the hall thanked us for sharing extra candles.
all.zh: 對門的一位老太太感謝我們分了幾根蠟燭給她。

all.en: My sister and I bought a small emergency kit at the hardware store later.
all.zh: 後來我和姊姊在五金行買了一個小型緊急應變包。

all.en: It included a flashlight, a radio, batteries, and a few portable chargers.
all.zh: 裡面有手電筒、收音機、電池，還有幾個行動電源。

all.en: We promised each other we would never feel scared during a blackout again.
all.zh: 我們答應彼此，以後再也不會因為停電而感到害怕。

all.en: That evening, we finally finished watching the horror movie we had started.
all.zh: 當晚，我們終於把之前沒看完的恐怖片看完了。

all.en: Honestly, real darkness had made the film feel much less frightening afterward.
all.zh: 老實說，真實的黑暗反而讓這部片之後顯得沒那麼可怕了。
